name: gmc
description: Bind GitHub issues to AI coding sessions and commit messages

scripts.test: node --check bin/gmc.js && node --check lib/git.js && node --check lib/github.js && node --check lib/config.js && node --check lib/prompts.js && node --check lib/agent.js && node --check lib/autogmc.js && node --check lib/web.js
